variants.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

I noticed {company_name} while researching {industry} businesses. AutoNova is a done-for-you service that automates repetitive sales and operations work for business owners.

We set up custom integrations that automatically handle your customer leads, trigger instant follow-ups, and sync your systems, removing hours of manual admin overhead every week.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute conversation next week to see how we could free up your time?

Best,
AutoNova Team

variants.subject_template: Quick question about lead follow-ups at {company_name}
variants.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

How does your team at {company_name} currently handle new customer inquiries and follow-ups in the {industry} space? If it is done manually, you might be losing valuable leads in the shuffle.

AutoNova provides a done-for-you service that automates your repetitive lead handling and customer follow-up workflows so nothing gets missed.

Would you be free for a brief 15-minute chat next Tuesday to explore how this works?

Best,
AutoNova Team

variants.subject_template: How other {industry} businesses are automating operations
variants.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

Many small businesses we work with were spending hours daily on manual data entry, customer follow-ups, and lead routing. We helped them automate these exact workflows, saving over 10 hours of admin work each week.

AutoNova is a done-for-you automation service designed to take this repetitive operations load off your plate at {company_name}.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call next week to see how other businesses in the {industry} space are using this?

AutoNova Team
